heroHeadline: IDF Kills 8 in Gaza and West Bank; Trump Signals Iran War Flexibility; France Denies Airspace for US Weapons
heroSubtitle: Israeli strikes kill 3 in Gaza City's Zeitoun and 5 more on March 31; IDF kills three Palestinians in West Bank on Land Day 50th anniversary; Trump tells aides he'll end Iran war without Hormuz reopening; France and Italy block US weapons transport to Israel, deepening NATO fracture on Day 32
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, UNRWA, Yesh Din, Human Rights Watch, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
